yaml.Fact_CO012_Actuals:
version: '1.1'

source: |-
  SELECT
    process_run_id,
    bic_chversion,
    bic_chcurtype, 
    fiscper,
    comp_code,
    SUM(volume_in_transactions_ctr) AS volume_in_transactions_ctr, 
    SUM(volume_in_uc) AS volume_in_uc, 
    SUM(net_sales_revenue) AS net_sales_revenue, 
    SUM(gross_profit_other) AS gross_profit_other, 
    SUM(gross_profit_total) AS gross_profit_total,
    SUM(revenue_other) AS revenue_other , -- Added revenue_other column
    SUM(underlying_ebit) AS ebit,
    SUM(cogs_fees_and_taxes) AS cogs_fees_and_taxes,
    SUM(direct_cost_of_advertising_promotion) AS dme,
    SUM(production_overheads) AS production_overheads,
    SUM(haulage) AS haulage,
    SUM(warehouse_total) AS warehouse_total,
    SUM(distribution_and_delivery_total) AS distribution_and_delivery_total,
    --AVG(net_contribution) AS avg_net_contribution,
    SUM(net_contribution) AS net_contribution,
    SUM(total_input_cost) AS total_input_cost
    --SUM(total_depreciation) AS total_depreciation,
  -- SUM(total_taxesfees_in_nsr) AS total_taxesfees_in_nsr
    FROM david_test_metrics.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals
    LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_CUSTOMER_md.ca_0_mat03_material AS mat
    ON material = mat.material
    LEFT JOIN  dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_md.ca_0_cus03_customer  AS cust
    ON customer_without_opex_allocation = cust.customer  -- Join the customer table ON the customer field
    WHERE bic_chcurtype = '30' 
  AND fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
  --AND  (comp_code IN('0563','0562') AND fiscper  IN  ('2025008','2025001','2024008','2024001','2023008'))
    GROUP BY
    process_run_id,
    bic_chversion,
    bic_chcurtype,
    fiscper,  
    comp_code

yaml.Fact_CO012_REBP:
version: '1.1'

source: |-
  WITH plan_data AS (-- Fetch data FROM the table
    SELECT 
      CASE 
      WHEN bic_chversion IN ('R040', 'R070', 'R100') THEN 'RE'
      ELSE bic_chversion 
      END AS bic_chversion,
      bic_chcurtype,        
      fiscper,    
      comp_code,        
      SUM(volume_in_transactions_ctr) AS volume_in_transactions_ctr,  
      SUM(volume_in_uc) AS volume_in_uc,  
      SUM(net_sales_revenue) AS net_sales_revenue,  
      SUM(gross_profit_other) AS gross_profit_other,
      SUM(gross_profit_total),
      SUM(revenue_other) AS revenue_other  ,
    SUM(underlying_ebit) AS ebit,
    SUM(direct_cost_of_advertising_promotion) AS dme,
    SUM(production_overheads) AS production_overheads,
    SUM(cogs_fees_and_taxes) AS cogs_fees_and_taxes,
    SUM(haulage) AS haulage,
    SUM(warehouse_total) AS warehouse_total,
      SUM(distribution_and_delivery_total) AS distribution_and_delivery_total,
    AVG(net_contribution) AS avg_net_contribution,
    SUM(net_contribution) AS net_contribution,
    SUM(total_input_cost) AS total_input_cost,
    SUM(total_depreciation) AS total_depreciation,
    SUM(total_taxesfees_in_nsr) AS total_taxesfees_in_nsr
    FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_planning
    LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_CUSTOMER_md.ca_0_mat03_material AS mat ON material = mat.material
    LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_md.ca_0_cus03_customer  AS cust
    ON customer_without_opex_allocation = cust.customer
    WHERE bic_chcurtype = '30' 
  --AND  (comp_code='0563' AND fiscper IN  ('2025008','2025001','2024008','2024001','2023008'))    
  AND fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    AND (bic_chversion = 'B000'
      OR  (LEFT(fiscper, 4) = CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING)  
        AND bic_chversion = '"& RE_Version &"'))
    GROUP BY 
      bic_chversion,
      bic_chcurtype,        
      fiscper,    
      comp_code), 
  actual_data AS (-- Fetch data FROM the table
    SELECT 
      'RE' AS bic_chversion,
      bic_chcurtype,        
      fiscper,    
      comp_code,        
      SUM(volume_in_transactions_ctr) AS volume_in_transactions_ctr,  
      SUM(volume_in_uc) AS volume_in_uc,  
      SUM(net_sales_revenue) AS net_sales_revenue,  
      SUM(gross_profit_other) AS gross_profit_other,
      SUM(gross_profit_total),
      SUM(revenue_other) AS revenue_other,
      SUM(underlying_ebit) AS ebit,
    SUM(direct_cost_of_advertising_promotion) AS dme,
    SUM(production_overheads) AS production_overheads,
    SUM(cogs_fees_and_taxes) AS cogs_fees_and_taxes,
    SUM(haulage) AS haulage,
    SUM(warehouse_total) AS warehouse_total,
      SUM(distribution_and_delivery_total) AS distribution_and_delivery_total,
    AVG(net_contribution) AS avg_net_contribution,
    SUM(net_contribution) AS net_contribution,
    SUM(total_input_cost) AS total_input_cost,
    SUM(total_depreciation) AS total_depreciation,
    SUM(total_taxesfees_in_nsr) AS total_taxesfees_in_nsr
    FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals
    LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_CUSTOMER_md.ca_0_mat03_material AS mat ON material = mat.material
    LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_md.ca_0_cus03_customer  AS cust
    ON customer_without_opex_allocation = cust.customer
    WHERE bic_chcurtype =  '30'
    --AND  (comp_code='0563' AND fiscper IN  ('2025008','2025001','2024008','2024001','2023008'))   
    AND (('"& RE_Version &"' = 'R000' AND 1=0)  -- This will return no rows for R000
      OR ('"& RE_Version &"' = 'R040' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '003'))
      OR ('"& RE_Version &"' = 'R070' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '006'))
      OR ('"& RE_Version &"' = 'R100' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '009')))
    GROUP BY 
      bic_chversion,
      bic_chcurtype,        
      fiscper,    
      comp_code)
  SELECT * FROM plan_data
  GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT
    *
  FROM actual_data
  GROUP BY ALL

yaml.Fact_HR_A:
version: '1.1'

source: |-
  SELECT
    comp_code, fiscper,
    COALESCE(func_area, '000000') AS func_area,
    COALESCE(bic_chrsegmnt, '000000') AS bic_chrsegmnt,
    bic_chcurtype, bic_ca_func, bic_ca_mcctr, bic_c_cococe,
    CASE
      WHEN bic_chversion = '"& RE_Version &"' THEN 'RE'
      ELSE bic_chversion
    END AS bic_chversion,
    bic_chversion AS bic_chversion1,
    CAST(COALESCE(SUBSTRING(bic_ca_mcctr, 4, 3), '0') AS BIGINT) AS dept_key,
    SUM(khr004001_fte_total) AS khr004001_fte_total,
    SUM(khr004011_number_of_voluntary_permanent_leavers) AS khr004011_number_of_voluntary_permanent_leavers,
    SUM(khr004012_number_of_involuntary_permanent_leavers) AS khr004012_number_of_involuntary_permanent_leavers,
    SUM(khr004013_actual_number_of_permanent_employees) AS khr004013_actual_number_of_permanent_employees,
    SUM(khr004048_no_of_vacant_positions) AS khr004048_no_of_vacant_positions,
    SUM(khr004005overtime_cost) AS khr004005overtime_cost,
    SUM(khr004004people_cost) AS khr004004people_cost
  FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_rtr.hr004_cross_functional_v1 WHERE fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    AND (bic_chversion IN ('B000','0000') OR (LEFT(fiscper, 4) = CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING)))
  GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT
    comp_code, fiscper,
    COALESCE(func_area, '000000') AS func_area,
    COALESCE(bic_chrsegmnt, '000000') AS bic_chrsegmnt,
    bic_chcurtype, bic_ca_func, bic_ca_mcctr, bic_c_cococe,
    'RE' AS bic_chversion,
    '' AS bic_chversion1,
    CAST(COALESCE(SUBSTRING(bic_ca_mcctr, 4, 3), '0') AS BIGINT) AS dept_key,
    SUM(khr004001_fte_total) AS khr004001_fte_total,
    SUM(khr004011_number_of_voluntary_permanent_leavers) AS khr004011_number_of_voluntary_permanent_leavers,
    SUM(khr004012_number_of_involuntary_permanent_leavers) AS khr004012_number_of_involuntary_permanent_leavers,
    SUM(khr004013_actual_number_of_permanent_employees) AS khr004013_actual_number_of_permanent_employees,
    SUM(khr004048_no_of_vacant_positions) AS khr004048_no_of_vacant_positions,
    SUM(khr004005overtime_cost) AS khr004005overtime_cost,
    SUM(khr004004people_cost) AS khr004004people_cost
  FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_rtr.hr004_cross_functional_v1 WHERE fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    AND bic_chversion = '0000'
    AND (('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R000' AND 1 = 0)
      OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R040' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '003'))
      OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R070' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '006'))
      OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R100' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '009')))
  GROUP BY ALL

comment: |-
  Supply chain HR cross-functional metrics for workforce planning and performance analysis.
  Provides actuals, budget, and rolling estimate views of key people KPIs including
  FTE headcount, employee turnover (voluntary and involuntary), vacant positions,
  people cost, and overtime cost — focused on supply chain functional areas.
  Used to track workforce efficiency, attrition trends, and labor cost management
  across company codes, cost centers, and departments.
  
  
  Technical details:
  Source: hr004_cross_functional_v1 (UNION: main data with RE version mapping + actuals-as-RE for completed periods).
  RE_Version PBI parameter dynamized: MONTH >= 10 → R100, >= 7 → R070, >= 4 → R040, else no RE.
  Fiscal period filter: fiscper >= 2 years ago. Version filter: bic_chversion <> R090.
  M transformations: COALESCE nulls (func_area, bic_chrsegmnt → '000000'), Dept_KEY from SUBSTRING(bic_ca_mcctr, 4, 3).

# ─── Joins ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

joins:
  - name: dim_department
    source: '`dc_adb-landing-zone-002`.idor.tsc_dim_department'
    "on": source.dept_key = dim_department.department_level_03_key
  - name: dim_company
    source: |-
      SELECT
        market_segment,
        business_unit,
        business_unit_abbreviation,
        country,
        country_abbreviation,
        geo_country,
        country_id,
        CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING) as co_code_bw,
        country_sequence_id,
        business_unit_sequence_id,
        process_run_id,
        comp_code
      FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          market_segment,
          business_unit,
          business_unit_abbreviation,
          country,
          country_abbreviation,
          geo_country,
          country_id,
          co_code_bw,
          country_sequence_id,
          business_unit_sequence_id,
          process_run_id,
          CASE
            WHEN LENGTH(CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING)) = 3
            THEN CONCAT('0', CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING))
            ELSE CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING)
          END as comp_code
        FROM david_test_metrics.udm_CUSTOMER_md.ca_dim_company
        WHERE co_code_bw IS NOT NULL
      ) base_data QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY comp_code ORDER BY comp_code) = 1
    "on": source.comp_code = dim_company.comp_code
  - name: dim_region
    source: |-
      SELECT
        region,
        region_sequence_id,
        CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING) as co_code_bw,
        comp_code
      FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          region,
          region_sequence_id,
          co_code_bw,
          CASE
            WHEN LENGTH(CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING)) = 3
            THEN CONCAT('0', CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING))
            ELSE CAST(co_code_bw AS STRING)
          END as comp_code
        FROM david_test_metrics.udm_CUSTOMER_md.ca_dim_company
        WHERE co_code_bw IS NOT NULL
      ) base_data
      WHERE region NOT IN ('Africa', 'Region 27', 'Region 28', 'P&C All', 'Europe', 'Europe excl. BU Russia', 'Total Territories', 'Region 29 Trading Update') AND region IS NOT NULL
      QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY comp_code ORDER BY comp_code) = 1
    "on": source.comp_code = dim_region.comp_code

# ─── Dimensions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

dimensions:
  - name: comp_code
    expr: source.comp_code
    comment: Company code identifying the legal entity within the group
    display_name: Company Code
    synonyms:
      - company
      - entity code
      - legal entity
  - name: func_area

  - name: bic_chversion1

  - name: bic_ca_func

yaml.Fact_PC_RE_All:
version: '1.1'

source: |-
  SELECT fiscper,
  func_area,
  bic_cconsunit,
  bic_chversion,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fis_code IN ('DHJ3','DHH3','DHM3','DHG3','DHE3','DCC3','DHC3','DHL3','DCD3','DHK3') THEN kbi_value END) AS people_cost_all,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fis_code IN ('DB','DFA')  THEN kbi_value END) AS nsr_all
    FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_bcs.bpc003_profit_and_loss_actuals
    WHERE bic_chcurtype = '30' 
    AND bic_ccons_grp='G.LOCAL'
  AND fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
  AND (bic_chversion IN ('B000','0000')
      OR  (LEFT(fiscper, 4) = CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING)  
        AND bic_chversion LIKE 'R%'))
  AND (CASE WHEN  bic_chversion= '0000' THEN  fiscper < (SELECT DISTINCT  CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE())*1000 +MONTH(CURRENT_DATE()) AS INT)
  FROM udm_datamart_bcs.bpc003_profit_and_loss_actuals) ELSE fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')  END)
  AND fis_code IN ('DHJ3','DHH3','DHM3','DHG3','DHE3','DCC3','DHC3','DHL3','DCD3','DHK3',
  'DB','DFA') 
      GROUP BY ALL

yaml.Fact_Fxn_Actuals:
version: '1.1'

source: |-
  WITH summarized_data AS (SELECT
      CASE WHEN comp_code = '0452' THEN '0450' ELSE comp_code END AS comp_code,
      fiscper,
      (SUM(net_sales_revenue) + SUM(revenue_other)) AS nsr_10
    FROM
      dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals
    WHERE
      bic_chcurtype = 10 AND bic_chversion = '0000'
    GROUP BY
      CASE WHEN comp_code = '0452' THEN '0450' ELSE comp_code END, fiscper),
  fxn_rate_calculation AS (SELECT
      comp_code,
      fiscper,
      nsr_10,
      COALESCE(r2.nsr_10, NULL) AS prev_year_nsr_10,
      COALESCE(r3.nsr_10, NULL) AS ppy_nsr_10,
      CASE
        WHEN r2.nsr_10 IS NOT NULL THEN nsr_10 / r2.nsr_10
        ELSE NULL
      END AS fxn_rate,
      CASE
        WHEN r3.nsr_10 IS NOT NULL THEN nsr_10 / r3.nsr_10
        ELSE NULL
      END AS fxn_rate_ppy
    FROM summarized_data
    LEFT JOIN summarized_data r2
      ON comp_code = r2.comp_code
      AND SUBSTRING(fiscper, 5, 3) = SUBSTRING(r2.fiscper, 5, 3)
      AND CAST(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 1, 4) AS INT) = CAST(SUBSTRING(r2.fiscper, 1, 4) AS INT) + 1
    LEFT JOIN summarized_data r3
      ON comp_code = r3.comp_code
      AND SUBSTRING(fiscper, 5, 3) = SUBSTRING(r3.fiscper, 5, 3)
      AND CAST(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 1, 4) AS INT) = CAST(SUBSTRING(r3.fiscper, 1, 4) AS INT) + 2),
  fxn_rates_table AS (SELECT
      comp_code,
      fiscper,
      nsr_10,
      prev_year_nsr_10,
      fxn_rate,
      ppy_nsr_10,
      fxn_rate_ppy
    FROM fxn_rate_calculation
    ORDER BY comp_code, fiscper)
  SELECT
    bic_chversion,
    bic_chcurtype,
    fiscper,
    CASE WHEN comp_code = '0452' THEN '0450' ELSE comp_code END AS comp_code,
    SUM(net_sales_revenue) AS nsr_bev,
    SUM(revenue_other) AS nsr_other,
    SUM(net_sales_revenue)/MAX(fxn_rate) AS nsr_bev_fxn_py,
    SUM(revenue_other)/MAX(fxn_rate) AS nsr_other_fxn_py,
    SUM(net_sales_revenue)/MAX(fxn_rate_ppy) AS nsr_bev_fxn_ppy,
    SUM(revenue_other)/MAX(fxn_rate_ppy) AS nsr_other_fxn_ppy
  FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals
  LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_CUSTOMER_md.ca_0_mat03_material AS mat
    ON material = mat.material
    LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_md.ca_0_cus03_customer  AS cust
    ON customer_without_opex_allocation = cust.customer
  LEFT JOIN fxn_rates_table
    ON (CASE WHEN comp_code = '0452' THEN '0450' ELSE comp_code END = fxn_rates_table.comp_code
      AND fiscper = fxn_rates_table.fiscper)
  WHERE bic_chcurtype = '30'
  --AND  (comp_code='0563' AND fiscper IN  ('2025008','2025001','2024008','2024001','2023008'))   
  AND fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
  GROUP BY
    bic_chversion,
    bic_chcurtype,
    fiscper,
    CASE WHEN comp_code = '0452' THEN '0450' ELSE comp_code END

yaml.Fact_Fxn_REBP:
version: '1.1'

source: |-
  WITH 
      cal_day_table AS (SELECT fiscper, fiscper_first_calday_ts
        FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals
        GROUP BY fiscper, fiscper_first_calday_ts),
      plan_data AS (SELECT 
      bic_chcurtype, 
      fiscper, 
      comp_code,
      CASE 
        WHEN bic_chversion IN ('R040', 'R070', 'R100') THEN 'RE'
        ELSE bic_chversion 
      END AS bic_chversion,
      SUM(net_sales_revenue) AS net_sales_revenue,
      SUM(cogs_other) AS cogs_other,
      SUM(gross_profit_total) AS gross_profit_total,
      SUM(gross_profit_other) AS gross_profit_other
        FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_fxn_plan
        LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_CUSTOMER_md.ca_0_mat03_material AS mat 
          ON material = mat.material
      LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_md.ca_0_cus03_customer AS cust
      ON customer_without_opex_allocation = cust.customer  
        LEFT JOIN cal_day_table 
          ON cal_day_table.fiscper = fiscper
        WHERE bic_chcurtype = '30'
        --AND  (comp_code='0563' AND fiscper IN  ('2025008','2025001','2024008','2024001','2023008'))   
  AND fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
        AND (bic_chversion = 'B000'
          OR (LEFT(fiscper, 4) = CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING)
            AND bic_chversion = '" & RE_Version & "'))
        GROUP BY 
      bic_chcurtype, 
      fiscper, 
      comp_code,
      bic_chversion),
      actual_data AS (SELECT 
      bic_chcurtype, 
      fiscper, 
      comp_code,
      'RE' AS bic_chversion,
      SUM(net_sales_revenue) AS net_sales_revenue,
      SUM(cogs_other) AS cogs_other,
      SUM(gross_profit_total) AS gross_profit_total,
      SUM(gross_profit_other) AS gross_profit_other
        FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals
        LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_CUSTOMER_md.ca_0_mat03_material AS mat 
          ON material = mat.material
      LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_md.ca_0_cus03_customer AS cust
      ON customer_without_opex_allocation = cust.customer  
        LEFT JOIN cal_day_table 
          ON cal_day_table.fiscper = fiscper
        WHERE bic_chcurtype = '30'
      -- AND  (comp_code='0563' AND fiscper IN  ('2025008','2025001','2024008','2024001','2023008'))   
        AND (('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R000' AND 1 = 0) 
          OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R040' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '003'))
          OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R070' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '006'))
          OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R100' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '009')))
        GROUP BY 
      bic_chcurtype, 
      fiscper, 
      comp_code,
      bic_chversion)
      SELECT * FROM actual_data
  GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT
    *
  FROM plan_data
  GROUP BY ALL

comment: |-
  PE009 — UC Metric View (FT_PE009)

  Source: dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_datamart_ftd__pe009_spr_recyclable_content

    format:
      type: percentage
      decimal_places:
        type: exact
        places: 2

  - name: rpet_flake_pct_hidden
    expr: SUM(source.rpet_flake_pct_hidden)
    comment: Rpet flake pct hidden
    display_name: Rpet Flake Pct Hidden
    format:
      type: percentage
      decimal_places:
        type: exact
        places: 2

  # ─── DAX-Translated Measures (4) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

  - name: sales_volume_in_bottles_m
    expr: MEASURE(sales_volume_in_bottles_number_in_millions)
    comment: "PBI: sales_volume_in_bottles(m)"
    display_name: Sales Volume In Bottles M

  - name: mat_cont_in_primary_pack_pet_virgin_pb
    expr: MEASURE(sales_pet_hidden)
    comment: "PBI: mat.cont.in_primary_pack_pet_virgin_pb"
    display_name: Mat Cont In Primary Pack Pet Virgin Pb

  - name: pet_virgin_plant_based
    expr: MEASURE(weight_pet_hidden)
    comment: "PBI: pet_virgin_(plant_based)"
    display_name: Pet Virgin Plant Based

  - name: wa_pet_virgin_pb
    expr: MEASURE(wa_pet_virgin_pb_plant_based_pct)
    display_name: Wa Pet Virgin Pb

  # ─── SWITCH-Decomposed Measures (17) ────────────────────────────────────────────

  - name: contrib_in_primary_pack_metal
    expr: >-
      SUM(source.recycle_content_avg_sales_metal_hidden) * SUM(source.weight_metal_hidden) / NULLIF(SUM(source.sales_metal_hidden) * 100, 0) * SUM(source.sales_metal_hidden) / NULLIF(1000000, 0)
    comment: "Material contribution in primary pack metal (SUMX→pre-aggregated)"

  - name: contrib_in_primary_pack_glass
    expr: >-
      SUM(source.recycle_content_avg_sales_glass_hidden) * SUM(source.weight_glass_hidden) / NULLIF(SUM(source.sales_glass_hidden) * 100, 0) * SUM(source.sales_glass_hidden) / NULLIF(1000000, 0)
    comment: "Material contribution in primary pack glass (SUMX→pre-aggregated)"

  - name: wa_rpet_chip_pct
    expr: SUM(source.rpet_chip_pct_hidden) / NULLIF(SUM(source.sales_pet_hidden), 0)
    comment: "WA rPET chip %"

  - name: wa_rpet_flake_pct
    expr: SUM(source.rpet_flake_pct_hidden) / NULLIF(SUM(source.sales_pet_hidden), 0)
    comment: "WA rPET flake %"

  - name: wa_pet_meltin_ob_oil_based_pct
    expr: SUM(source.pet_meltin_ob_oil_based_pct_hidden) / NULLIF(SUM(source.sales_pet_hidden), 0)
    comment: "WA PET Meltin OB Oil-Based %"

  - name: wa_recycled_content_glass_pct
    expr: SUM(source.recycle_content_avg_sales_glass_hidden) / NULLIF(SUM(source.sales_glass_hidden), 0)
    comment: "WA Recycled Content Glass %"

  - name: wa_recycled_content_metal_pct
    expr: SUM(source.recycle_content_avg_sales_metal_hidden) / NULLIF(SUM(source.sales_metal_hidden), 0)
    comment: "WA Recycled Content Metal %"

  - name: wa_raw_material_weight_g
    expr: SUM(source.weight_g_sales_hidden) / NULLIF(SUM(source.sales_volume_in_bottles_number_in_millions), 0)
    comment: "WA Raw Material Weight (g)"

  - name: rpet_chip_gram_per_one_preform
    expr: MEASURE(wa_rpet_chip_pct) * MEASURE(wa_raw_material_weight_g)
    comment: "rPET Chip gram per one preform"

  - name: rpet_flake_gram_per_one_preform
    expr: MEASURE(wa_rpet_flake_pct) * MEASURE(wa_raw_material_weight_g)
    comment: "rPET Flake gram per one preform"

  - name: pet_meltin_oil_based
    expr: MEASURE(wa_pet_meltin_ob_oil_based_pct) * MEASURE(wa_raw_material_weight_g)
    comment: "PET Meltin Oil-Based"

  - name: mat_contr_in_prim_pack_glass
    expr: MEASURE(wa_recycled_content_glass_pct)*SUM(source.weight_glass_hidden) / NULLIF(SUM(source.sales_glass_hidden) * 100, 0)
    comment: "Mat. contr in prim pack glass"

  - name: mat_contr_in_prim_pack_met
    expr: MEASURE(wa_recycled_content_metal_pct)*SUM(source.weight_metal_hidden) / NULLIF(SUM(source.sales_metal_hidden) * 100, 0)
    comment: "Mat. contr in prim pack metal"

  - name: mat_cont_in_primary_pack_pet_meltin_ob
    expr: MEASURE(pet_meltin_oil_based)*SUM(source.sales_pet_hidden) / NULLIF(1000000, 0)
    comment: "Mat Cont primary pack PET Meltin OB"

  - name: mat_cont_in_primary_pack_rpet_chip
    expr: MEASURE(rpet_chip_gram_per_one_preform)*SUM(source.sales_pet_hidden) / NULLIF(1000000, 0)
    comment: "Mat Cont primary pack rPET Chip"

  - name: mat_cont_in_primary_pack_rpet_flake
    expr: MEASURE(rpet_flake_gram_per_one_preform)*SUM(source.sales_pet_hidden) / NULLIF(1000000, 0)
    comment: "Mat Cont primary pack rPET Flake"

  - name: recyclable_content_on_market_tons
    expr: >-
      MEASURE(contrib_in_primary_pack_glass) + MEASURE(contrib_in_primary_pack_metal) + MEASURE(mat_cont_in_primary_pack_pet_meltin_ob) + MEASURE(mat_cont_in_primary_pack_rpet_chip) + MEASURE(mat_cont_in_primary_pack_rpet_flake)
    comment: "Recyclable content on market (Tons) = sum of all material contributions"

yaml.FT_bpc003_losses:
version: '1.1'

source: |-
  SELECT
  FormatedDate,
  REPLACE(comp_code, 'C', '') AS comp_code,
  fiscper,
  bic_chversion,
  COALESCE(func_area, 'F0') AS func_area,
  bic_chcurtype,
  kbi_value,
  gl_account
  FROM (WITH fact_bpc003_initial AS (SELECT 
        bic_cconsunit,fiscper,func_area,bic_chcurtype,bic_ccons_grp,bic_chversion,gl_account,kbi_value,
        hier_tab.hierarch_level,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY bic_cconsunit, fiscper, func_area, bic_chcurtype, bic_ccons_grp, bic_chversion, gl_account
          ORDER BY hier_tab.hierarch_level DESC) AS row_num
      FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_bcs.bpc003_profit_and_loss_actuals
        LEFT JOIN (SELECT bic_ccsfis, MAX(hierarch_level) AS hierarch_level
              FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_md.bic_ccsitem_hierarchy
              GROUP BY bic_ccsfis) AS hier_tab
        ON hier_tab.bic_ccsfis = fis_code
      WHERE 
        ((bic_chcurtype = 10 AND bic_ccons_grp = 'G.LOCAL')
        OR 
        (bic_chcurtype = 30 AND bic_ccons_grp = 'G.LOCAL'))
        AND CAST(LEFT(fiscper,4) AS INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 AND CAST(LEFT(fiscper,4) AS INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
        AND bic_chversion IN ('B000','0000')
        AND bic_chcurtype ='30'
        AND bic_ccons_grp='G.LOCAL'),
  ce_group_level AS (SELECT distinct
        ce_group_level_1 ,ce_group_level_2,
        gl_account_range 
      FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_theedge_user_input_ca.opex_detailed_mapping
      WHERE 1=1
      AND ce_group_level_1 <> ' '
      AND ce_group_level_1= 'BUSINESS LOSSES')
    SELECT CAST(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') AS date) AS formateddate,bic_cconsunit AS comp_code,CAST(gl_account AS int) AS gl_account,
    fiscper,bic_chversion,func_area, bic_chcurtype,SUM(kbi_value) AS kbi_value
    FROM fact_bpc003_initial join ce_group_level ON CAST(gl_account AS int) = gl_account_range
    WHERE row_num = 1
    AND fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    GROUP BY ALL) _src
  WHERE true

yaml.Fact_Fxn_REBP_extended:
version: '1.1'

source: |-
  WITH 
      cal_day_table AS (SELECT fiscper, fiscper_first_calday_ts
        FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals
        GROUP BY fiscper, fiscper_first_calday_ts),
      plan_data AS (SELECT 
      bic_chcurtype, 
      fiscper, 
      comp_code,
      CASE 
        WHEN bic_chversion IN ('R040', 'R070', 'R100') THEN 'RE'
        ELSE bic_chversion 
      END AS bic_chversion,
      SUM(haulage) AS haulage,
      SUM(total_input_cost) AS total_input_cost,
      SUM(production_overheads) AS production_overheads,
      SUM(gross_profit_other) AS gross_profit_other
        FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_fxn_plan
        LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_CUSTOMER_md.ca_0_mat03_material AS mat 
          ON material = mat.material
      LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_md.ca_0_cus03_customer AS cust
      ON customer_without_opex_allocation = cust.customer  
        LEFT JOIN cal_day_table 
          ON cal_day_table.fiscper = fiscper
        WHERE bic_chcurtype = '30'
        --AND  (comp_code='0563' AND fiscper IN  ('2025008','2025001','2024008','2024001','2023008'))   
  AND fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
        AND (bic_chversion = 'B000'
          OR (LEFT(fiscper, 4) = CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING)
            AND bic_chversion = '" & RE_Version & "'))
        GROUP BY 
      bic_chcurtype, 
      fiscper, 
      comp_code,
      bic_chversion),
      actual_data AS (SELECT 
      bic_chcurtype, 
      fiscper, 
      comp_code,
      'RE' AS bic_chversion,
      SUM(haulage) AS haulage,
      SUM(total_input_cost) AS total_input_cost,
      SUM(production_overheads) AS production_overheads,
      SUM(gross_profit_other) AS gross_profit_other
        FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_fm.co012_profitability_gross_profit_analysis_actuals
        LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_CUSTOMER_md.ca_0_mat03_material AS mat 
          ON material = mat.material
      LEFT JOIN dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_cch_bw_md.ca_0_cus03_customer AS cust
      ON customer_without_opex_allocation = cust.customer  
        LEFT JOIN cal_day_table 
          ON cal_day_table.fiscper = fiscper
        WHERE bic_chcurtype = '30'
      -- AND  (comp_code='0563' AND fiscper IN  ('2025008','2025001','2024008','2024001','2023008'))   
        AND (('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R000' AND 1 = 0) 
          OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R040' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '003'))
          OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R070' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '006'))
          OR ('" & RE_Version & "' = 'R100' AND fiscper BETWEEN CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '001') AND CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) AS STRING), '009')))
        GROUP BY 
      bic_chcurtype, 
      fiscper, 
      comp_code,
      bic_chversion)
      SELECT * FROM actual_data
  GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT
    *
  FROM plan_data
  GROUP BY ALL

    CASE

    SUM(bic_kvoldlv_c) AS bic_kvoldlv_c,
    SUM(bic_kvolinv_c) AS bic_kvolinv_c

  GROUP BY ALL UNION ALL SELECT
    process_run_id, fiscper, comp_code, NULL AS ship_point, bic_cdelplnt AS plant, salesorg,
    SUM(delivered_in_full_phc) AS delivered_in_full_phc,

    AND  doc_type IN ('ZEX', 'ZIK', 'ZOF', 'ZOFC', 'ZOFN', 'ZOFS', 'ZOR', 'ZORA', 'ZORB', 'ZORG', 'ZORH', 'ZPU')

      WHEN bic_kvolinv_c <> 0
    AND bill_type IN ('F2', 'ZF2A', 'ZIK', 'ZORG', 'ZOW2', 'ZPU', 'ZRU', 'ZTRS')
    AND doc_type NOT IN ('ZEMS', 'ZJD', 'ZJF', 'ZJFC', 'ZKE', 'ZOFD', 'ZORM')

    AND bill_type IN ('G2', 'L2', 'ZG2', 'ZG2C', 'ZG2P', 'ZIC', 'ZL2', 'ZL2C', 'ZL2I', 'ZL2P', 'ZOW2', 'ZOWC', 'ZRF')

    THEN bill_num ELSE NULL END)) AS nr_of_credit_memos,

yaml.FT_bpc003_losses_RE:
version: '1.1'

source: |-
  SELECT
  FormatedDate,
  REPLACE(comp_code, 'C', '') AS comp_code,
  gl_account,
  fiscper,
  bic_chversion,
  COALESCE(func_area, 'F0') AS func_area,
  bic_chcurtype,
  kbi_value
  FROM (WITH fact_bpc003_initial AS (SELECT 
        bic_cconsunit,fiscper,func_area,bic_chcurtype,bic_ccons_grp,bic_chversion,gl_account,kbi_value,
        hier_tab.hierarch_level,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY bic_cconsunit, fiscper, func_area, bic_chcurtype, bic_ccons_grp, bic_chversion, gl_account
          ORDER BY hier_tab.hierarch_level DESC) AS row_num
      FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_bcs.bpc003_profit_and_loss_actuals
        LEFT JOIN (SELECT bic_ccsfis, MAX(hierarch_level) AS hierarch_level
              FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.udm_datamart_md.bic_ccsitem_hierarchy
              GROUP BY bic_ccsfis) AS hier_tab
        ON hier_tab.bic_ccsfis = fis_code
      WHERE 
        ((bic_chcurtype = 10 AND bic_ccons_grp = 'G.LOCAL')
        OR 
        (bic_chcurtype = 30 AND bic_ccons_grp = 'G.LOCAL'))
        AND CAST(LEFT(fiscper,4) AS INT) >= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - 3 AND CAST(LEFT(fiscper,4) AS INT) <= YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)
        AND bic_chversion IN ('" & RE_Version & "')
        AND bic_chcurtype ='30'
        AND bic_ccons_grp='G.LOCAL'),
  ce_group_level AS (SELECT distinct
        ce_group_level_1 ,ce_group_level_2,
        gl_account_range 
      FROM dc_datalake_prod_001.curated_theedge_user_input_ca.opex_detailed_mapping
      WHERE 1=1
      AND ce_group_level_1 <> ' '
      AND ce_group_level_1= 'BUSINESS LOSSES')
    SELECT CAST(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(fiscper, 0, 4), '-', SUBSTRING(fiscper, 6, 2), '-01') AS date) AS formateddate,bic_cconsunit AS comp_code,CAST(gl_account AS int) AS gl_account,
    fiscper,bic_chversion,func_area, bic_chcurtype,SUM(kbi_value) AS kbi_value
    FROM fact_bpc003_initial join ce_group_level ON CAST(gl_account AS int) = gl_account_range
    WHERE row_num = 1
    AND fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    GROUP BY ALL) _src
  WHERE true
